metadata.title: Blue Star
metadata.description: Generate Anki flashcards in multiple ways.

regex.source: Notice('Regex pattern is required for "Regex" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "Regex" 解析策略,正则表达式模式是必需的')

regex.source: Notice('Heading level is required for "Section::Subsectioin" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "部分::子标题" 解析策略,标题级别是必需的')

regex.source: Notice('Heading level is required for "Heading::Paragraph" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "标题::段落" 解析策略,标题级别是必需的')

regex.source: Notice('Heading level is required for "Multi-Subsection" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "多子部分" 解析策略,标题级别是必需的')

regex.source: Notice('Heading level is required for "Multi-Subparagraph" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "多子段落" 解析策略,标题级别是必需的')

regex.source: Notice('Custom delimiter is required for "Custom delimiter" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "自定义分隔符" 解析策略,自定义分隔符是必需的')

regex.source: Notice('Custom delimiter is required for "Single delimiter" parser strategy')
regex.target: Notice('对于 "单个分隔符" 解析策略,自定义分隔符是必需的')

Notice(`已添加 ${addedCount} 张 Anki 卡片,
跳过了 ${skippedCount} 张 Anki 卡片,
来自文件 "${fileName}"。`)

regex.source:
Notice(`Added ${addedCount} Anki cards
Updated ${updatedCount} Anki cards
Skipped ${skipCount} Anki cards
from file "${fileName}".`)
regex.target:
Notice(`已添加 ${addedCount} 张 Anki 卡片,
已更新 ${updatedCount} 张 Anki 卡片,
跳过了 ${skipCount} 张 Anki 卡片,
来自文件 "${fileName}"。`)
Notice("正在生成 Anki 记忆卡片...")

regex.source: Notice("Generating flashcards...\n\nPlease do not click repeatedly or execute the command multiple times.")
regex.target: Notice("正在生成记忆卡片...\n\n请勿重复点击或多次执行命令。")

regex.source: Notice(`No content matched the pattern in file "${activeFile.name}".`)
regex.target: Notice(`文件 "${activeFile.name}" 中没有内容匹配该模式。`)

regex.source:
Notice(`Error: ${error.message}

When creating Anki cards from file "${activeFile.name}".`)
regex.target:
Notice(`错误: ${error.message}

在从文件 "${activeFile.name}" 创建 Anki 卡片时。`)

regex.source: Notice(`Error creating Anki cards from file "${file.name}": ${error.message}`)
regex.target: Notice(`从文件 "${file.name}" 创建 Anki 卡片时出错: ${error.message}`)

regex.source: Notice(`Processing completed. Total files: ${totalFiles}, Processed files: ${processedFiles}, Skipped files: ${skippedFiles}.`)
regex.target: Notice(`处理完成。总文件数: ${totalFiles},已处理文件数: ${processedFiles},跳过文件数: ${skippedFiles}。`)

regex.source: name: "Create Anki cards from current file"
regex.target: name: "从当前文件创建 Anki 卡片"
name: "从目录创建 Anki 卡片"

regex.source: text: "2. For usage instructions, please refer to: "
text: "3. Obsidian_2_Anki is a powerful Obsidian plugin for generating Anki flashcards. Our Regex come from "
regex.target: text: "3. Obsidian_2_Anki 是一个强大的 Obsidian 插件,用于生成 Anki 记忆卡片。我们的正则表达式来自"

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the directory path to scan for files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定要扫描文件的目录路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the tag for files that need to be included in the specified directory.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定需要包含在指定目录中的文件标签。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the tag for files that need to be excluded in the specified directory.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定需要排除在指定目录中的文件标签。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, existing cards in Anki will be updated. Otherwise, only new cards will be added.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,现有的 Anki 卡片将被更新。否则,仅添加新卡片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, allows generating Anki cards with a single field.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用,允许生成单字段的 Anki 卡片。")

.setDesc("如果启用,添加 HTML 换行
。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The default deck to add cards to.")
.setDesc("The default model (note type) to use for cards.")
regex.target: .setDesc("卡片使用的默认模型（笔记类型）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The default tag to add to cards.")
.setDesc("The mode to use for matching content.")
.setDesc('Select the title level to match for "section-subsection" mode.')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择用于 "section-subsection" 模式的标题级别。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Select the heading level to match for "heading-paragraph" mode.')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择用于 "heading-paragraph" 模式的标题级别。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Select the title heading to match for "multi-section" mode.')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择用于 "multi-section" 模式的标题标题。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Select the title heading to match for "multi-paragraph" mode.')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择用于 "multi-paragraph" 模式的标题标题。')
.setDesc("添加或编辑正则表达式模式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the delimiter to mark the start of a card.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定标记卡片开始的分隔符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the delimiter to separate fields within a card.")
.setDesc("Specify the delimiter to mark the end of a card.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定标记卡片结束的分隔符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("1. You can specify Anki's multi-level decks using ::, for example: Deck::SubDeck")
regex.target: .setDesc("1. 可以使用 :: 指定 Anki 的多级卡组,例如:Deck::SubDeck")

regex.source: alias: "Multi-line Q&A starting with Q: and A:"
regex.target: alias: "多行 Q&A 以 Q: 和 A: 开头"
